top_signals.title: Oil Declines After US-Iran Peace Talks Show Signs of Progress
top_signals.summary: Oil declined as Iran said there had been progress in peace talks with the US, bolstering hopes for a recovery in flows from the Persian Gulf.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BoE dilutes stablecoin rules with plan for £40bn issuer limit
top_signals.summary: Proposed regulations would no longer restrict holdings by individuals and companies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: China’s CATL to offer battery swapping for Europe’s electric trucks
top_signals.summary: Partnership with Octopus Energy to launch more than 30 stations for electric lorries in Europe by 2035
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Announcement of the publication of the Governor's interview transcript
top_signals.summary: Statement from the Bank of England
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Taiko halts its Ethereum layer-2 network after a bridge exploit, token dives
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bank of England eases stablecoin rules, introduces 40B pound issuance cap
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England published draft rules for systemic stablecoins, easing reserve requirements and replacing holding limits with a temporary 40 billion pound issuance cap.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Coca-Cola brings in restructuring lineup over failed Costa sale
top_signals.summary: US beverage giant Coca-Cola has called in a team of restructuring experts to advise on the failed sale of high street drinks retailer Costa Coffee last year. Consultancy firms Alvarez & Marsal and Alix Partners, which both have prominent City presences, are reportedly advising the coffee chain after an attempt to sell it off was [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
